commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0622977cbba49672bd446e3b9a3b0020e91fe0fd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots/restores memory-core full-reindex retry state, mirrors embedding-cache batches during safe reindex rollback, adds regression coverage and test routing, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +83, Tests +256, Docs +1. Total +340 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and linked source proof: current main can lose retry intent and temp-DB cache batches after a safe full reindex fails after partial work. I did not run tests in this read-only review, but the source PR includes real CLI/SQLite A/B evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the single CHANGELOG.md line without changing the memory-core runtime or tests.

target.title: fix(memory): preserve reindex rollback recovery
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair #59137 in place so failed full memory reindexes restore retry state and preserve successful embedding-cache batches without regressing current main's temp-DB cleanup ordering.
- Preserve the current `beforeTempCleanup` / close-temp-db-before-removal contract before temp SQLite files are deleted.
- Keep #88599's transient embedding retry/splitting behavior intact; this PR covers the remaining rollback/cache recovery scope.

## Credit
This repair carries forward TSHOGX's work from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/59137 and the earlier #55497 lineage. It also uses the hydrated kunpeng-ai-lab cleanup-contract analysis as review context.

## Validation
- `pnpm test extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.reindex-recovery.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.atomic-reindex.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/memory-core`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- fresh Codex `/review` after repair, with ClawSweeper/Greptile/Codex findings addressed or proven non-actionable before merge.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-5644-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/59137
- Credit: Preserve TSHOGX's contributor credit for #59137 and the earlier #55497 rollback/cache recovery lineage.; Mention that #59137 is the source PR being repaired in place, not replaced.; Hydrated comments also credit kunpeng-ai-lab for the narrow beforeTempCleanup cleanup blocker analysis and cb02215b5 follow-up branch; use that as review evidence or cherry-pick context only after normal branch/review checks.
- Validation: pnpm test extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.reindex-recovery.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.atomic-reindex.test.ts; pnpm test extensions/memory-core; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #59137 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against a5c93b0d3a4b.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
